name: maw-context
description: Author and maintain the MAW project-context overlay (`maw/project-context/`) — the project knowledge the pipeline injects into agents. Use when the user says "add project context", "set up MAW for this project", "register a project invariant / rule / lesson / tool / skill / domain for the pipeline", or "review MAW context proposals". Supports flag: --review to go straight to folding pending PCTX_PROPOSALS.md entries.
